Seismic Risk Dashboard
All charts respond to the slicers. Map points are plotted from dataset latitude and longitude.

Executive overview

A filtered command-center view of earthquake occurrence, severity, depth, impact, and energy release.

Monthly event trend
Filtered events by month.
Magnitude class mix
Share of M5, M6, M7, and M8+ events.
Impact by depth class
Average impact reveals shallow-event exposure.
Top risk countries / regions
Composite of frequency, average magnitude, and average impact.

Real latitude/longitude map

Published world country geometry is drawn underneath the earthquake epicenters. Every point uses the dataset longitude and latitude.

Epicenter map
Color = magnitude, size = impact score. Hover any point for event details.

Occurrence patterns

Frequency by year, season, hour, weekday, and rolling rate.

Events by year
Seasonality by month
Events by UTC hour
Events by weekday
90-day rolling monthly rate
Smoothed count expressed as events per 30 days.

Magnitude and depth

Magnitude distribution, Gutenberg-Richter fit, depth classes, and magnitude-depth relationship.

Magnitude histogram
Gutenberg-Richter curve
log10(N >= M) = a - bM.
Depth classes
Magnitude vs depth
Scatter is downsampled for speed when needed.

Risk and impact

Impact Score response to magnitude, depth, and energy release.

Impact vs magnitude
Mean impact heatmap
Magnitude bin by depth bin.
Annual seismic energy
log10 joules, from log10(E)=1.5M+4.8.
Cumulative energy release
Highest-impact events

Geographic concentration

Country concentration, named source zones, and latitude/longitude banding.

Top countries by count
Highest average magnitude
Shown for countries/regions with enough filtered events.
Latitude bands
Longitude bands

Recommendations and insights

The recommendations update conceptually with the filtered view, while remaining grounded in the full dataset patterns.
